selections.name: Eynesbury (NZ)
selections.reason: Chris Waller trained gelding with strong metropolitan form, finishing 4th at Rosehill last start. The drop to provincial grade is a major advantage.

selections.name: Cellphone
selections.reason: Another Waller runner who was well-supported on debut and boxed on steadily for 5th. Should take significant improvement from that run.

selections.name: All Star
selections.reason: Has been racing consistently with solid efforts at Hawkesbury. Draws the inside barrier and will be highly competitive.

selections.name: Crudo (NZ)
selections.reason: Second-up after a fair 5th here on a slow track. Capable of improvement with fitness on his side.

danger_horse.name: Cellphone
danger_horse.reason: Stablemate to the top pick and has the profile of a rapid improver second-up.

selections.name: Hammoon Heroine (GB)
selections.reason: Resuming but has excellent form at this track, including a 2nd and 3rd in Super Maiden company. Looks primed for a bold first-up showing.

selections.name: Aladdin's Girl (NZ)
selections.reason: Waller filly who drops in class after a 5th at Rosehill. Draws well and is a major threat in this grade.

selections.name: Aida
selections.reason: Hawkes trained filly who ran a strong 3rd at Rosehill last start. The wide draw is a slight concern but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Look Here
selections.reason: Snowden filly who was 4th at Warwick Farm last start. Fitter now and commands respect.

danger_horse.name: Aladdin's Girl (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Drops from metropolitan grade to provincial and draws perfectly to strike.

selections.name: Sir Les
selections.reason: Got off the mark impressively on debut at Wyong. Shows excellent early speed and can overcome the wide draw to feature prominently.

selections.name: Nullarbor Jane
selections.reason: Resumes here after a break. Won her maiden in good style at Hawkesbury last preparation and looks a strong contender fresh.

selections.name: Queen's Rhapsody
selections.reason: First-up specialist who draws the inside rail. Has a class edge on several of these and will be in the finish.

selections.name: Take Flight
selections.reason: Won her maiden at Wyong last start. Steps up in grade but has winning momentum.

danger_horse.name: Nullarbor Jane
danger_horse.reason: Has shown high class previously and can sprint well fresh.

selections.name: Smashing Time
selections.reason: Top rater who won a BM64 at this track last preparation. Resumes here with a strong trial win and maps perfectly from barrier 2.

selections.name: Presides
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd in a Class 1 here before spelling. Draws the rail and has the tactical speed to challenge.

selections.name: Divine Secrets (NZ)
selections.reason: Ran 2nd in a F&M BM64 at this track two starts back. Drops back from a tougher Rosehill assignment.

selections.name: Close Encounter
selections.reason: Has been racing in tougher metropolitan company. The drop to provincial grade makes him a solid value inclusion.

danger_horse.name: Presides
danger_horse.reason: Excellent track form and gets the perfect run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Coco Dior
selections.reason: Has been placing consistently, including a solid 3rd at Albury last start. Finds a very winnable maiden here.

selections.name: Entrapment
selections.reason: Placed 3rd here two starts back. Wide draw is a slight negative but has the ability to figure in the finish.

selections.name: Zamalek
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and can improve sharply in this field despite the wide barrier.

selections.name: Cosmora
selections.reason: Gains a start and has shown glimpses of ability. Worth including in exotics at a price.

danger_horse.name: Entrapment
danger_horse.reason: Has shown enough in previous Kembla runs to be a major threat if she gets luck from the wide gate.

selections.name: Kitty Okay
selections.reason: Won impressively at this track and distance last start. Draws well to get a similar run and can go back-to-back.

selections.name: Dumebi
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class after a 2nd in a BM82 at Wagga. Class runner of the field and a massive danger.

selections.name: Common Goal
selections.reason: Won a Class 2 at Canberra last start. In great form and can measure up to this grade.

selections.name: Equilibrist
selections.reason: Won here three starts back. Forgive the recent Rosehill run; much better suited in this company.

danger_horse.name: Dumebi
danger_horse.reason: The class drop from BM82 to Conditional BM68 is a huge advantage.

selections.name: Pappa Blue (NZ)
selections.reason: Takes a massive class drop from the Group 3 Carbine Club Stakes at Randwick. Won a BM64 here prior to that. Clear top pick despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Wild Thoughts
selections.reason: Has solid metropolitan form and draws perfectly in barrier 2. Will be highly competitive in this grade.

selections.name: Canadian Fling
selections.reason: Consistent mare who ran 2nd in a Class 1 at Canberra last start. Maps well and is a solid each-way chance.

selections.name: Audenzia
selections.reason: Has been racing well in similar grade and has the tactical speed to overcome the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Wild Thoughts
danger_horse.reason: Drops from metro grade and gets the gun run from the inside barrier.
